expectations.evidence: Three $: blocks are used for drums, bassline, and melody respectively

expectations.text: Includes drum pattern with bd and other elements
expectations.evidence: s("bd*4, [~ sd]*2, hh*8") — kick, snare, and hi-hat are all present
note("c2 c2 eb2 g2").s("bass") and note("c2 c2 eb2 g2").s("sawtooth") provide basslines at octave 2
"bd*4" is used and explicitly described as "four-on-the-floor kick drum — the hallmark of house music"

expectations.text: Uses at least one audio effect
